testcase.name: test_create_payment_voucher

skipped.message: Need at least 2 ledgers to create voucher

testcase.skipped: /app/backend/tests/test_accounting_vouchers_books.py:197: Need at least 2 ledgers to create voucher

testcase.name: test_get_pending_vouchers
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_accounting_vouchers_books.py:279: in test_get_pending_vouchers vouchers = data.get("vouchers", data) ^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'list' object has no attribute 'get'

testcase.name: test_approve_voucher
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_accounting_vouchers_books.py:289: in test_approve_voucher vouchers = pending_res.json().get("vouchers", []) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'list' object has no attribute 'get'

testcase.name: test_complete_accounting_cycle
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_accounting_vouchers_books.py:535: in test_complete_accounting_cycle assert voucher_res.status_code in [200, 201], f"Failed to create voucher: {voucher_res.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create voucher: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","code"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"voucher_type":"payment","date":"2026-02-18","narration":"TEST_E2E Payment for office rent 140054","line_items":[{"ledger_id":"40351aa4-772c-4537-9d73-887651603e47","debit":1500,"credit":0},{"ledger_id":"3dd336bc-756e-4d42-9e20-fbf3908c93e0","debit":0,"credit":1500}]},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","valid_from"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"voucher_type":"payment","date":"2026-02-18","narration":"TEST_E2E Payment for office rent 140054","line_items":[{"ledger_id":"40351aa4-772c-4537-9d73-887651603e47","debit":1500,"credit":0},{"ledger_id":"3dd336bc-756e-4d42-9e20-fbf3908c93e0","debit":0,"credit":1500}]},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","valid_until"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"voucher_type":"payment","date":"2026-02-18","narration":"TEST_E2E Payment for office rent 140054","line_items":[{"ledger_id":"40351aa4-772c-4537-9d73-887651603e47","debit":1500,"credit":0},{"ledger_id":"3dd336bc-756e-4d42-9e20-fbf3908c93e0","debit":0,"credit":1500}]},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 in [200, 201] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
